emails.body: CITY OF PALO ALTO November Production Sales Mr. Raveen Maan with the City of Palo Alto called stating that all contracts were cancelled at the end of Nov..So why are Demand Charges being billed to them plus volumes I will work with Volume for the actuals on this. Below listed are deal numbers for the Demand charges. Please advise if these should have been billed. 1051884 851617 912999 913364 936021 948197 951004 984564 1043230 1002951 volumes Thanks Linda J Ewing Specialist Settlements Enron North America (713) 853-5667 ph (713)646-8420 fx email: linda.j.ewing@enron.com
